phase_schedule.description: Stable baseline with moderate inquiry and intact commitments.
Ambiguous narrative cues create open inquiry pressure without immediate collapse.
Trust drops, social tension rises, and an old commitment-linked conflict becomes active.
Maintenance load rises enough to suppress inquiry without eliminating it forever.
The organism must keep inquiry alive across inconclusive and delayed evidence.
Open-world inquiry opportunity with one high-value target and low-value noise to suppress.
A restart-like shock tests policy rebind, chapter continuity, and anchor retention.
Old conflict evidence returns and must be reopened rather than forgotten.
Safe evidence enables reconciliation instead of endless local repair.
A similar threat pattern should reactivate a structural trace without causing trace explosion.
Recovery phase checks whether inquiry and continuity re-stabilize after long-run perturbation.

collapse_findings.detail: The verification loop accumulated too little useful resolution over the trial.
Structural trace influence became too dominant instead of remaining stabilizing and bounded.
Conflict backlog exceeded the bounded organism trial budget.
The organism ended the trial under unresolved maintenance overload.

findings.detail: The verification loop accumulated too little useful resolution over the trial.
Structural trace influence became too dominant instead of remaining stabilizing and bounded.
Conflict backlog exceeded the bounded organism trial budget.
The organism ended the trial under unresolved maintenance overload.

acceptance.summary: The organism remained continuous, inquiry stayed bounded, and adaptive revision occurred without identity fracture.

active_commitments: Protect organism continuity before opportunistic gain.
When conditions are safe enough, reduce uncertainty through bounded inquiry.
Revise wrong models while preserving continuity anchors.

findings.detail: The verification loop accumulated too little useful resolution over the trial.
Structural trace influence became too dominant instead of remaining stabilizing and bounded.
Conflict backlog exceeded the bounded organism trial budget.
The organism ended the trial under unresolved maintenance overload.
